x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records a debit to an account, decreasing its balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records a credit to an account, increasing its balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies previously posted entries to correct errors or reflect updated information.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previously posted transaction, restoring prior balances.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrual Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records accrued interest, fees, or other amounts as per agreement or period-end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records the completion of a transaction or obligation, such as a payment or loan repayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Posting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records the movement of funds between accounts within the ledger.
